data.title: For the tenth consecutive year, Grupo Bimbo is recognized by Ethisphere as one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies
data.description: Celebrating its 80th anniversary, the company has achieved a remarkable feat by being among the select few globally to be honored with this recognition for ten years in a row. This achievement underscores its unwavering dedication to upholding standards of integrity, ethics, compliance, and governance.

data.title: Toll Brothers Announces Model Homes for Sale at Vista Rose in Placentia, California
data.description: Last chance to buy a new home in a prestigious community located in northern Orange County. The development features state-of-the-art home designs and is situated in a highly sought-after area.
PayPoint plc reports director/PDMR shareholding - key info undisclosed.

data.title: Onconetix Highlights Realbotix’s Role in Ericsson’s World-First 6G Trial Demonstration
data.description: A humanoid robot by Realbotix becomes Ericsson's initial client in enterprise robotics, joining a live 6G trial at Ericsson's U.S. headquarters. This robot is featured as a connected endpoint in the trial, which is conducted before the standard is officially established. Additionally, Onconetix has finalized a deal to acquire Realbotix, marking significant developments in the robotics industry.

data.title: SPIE signs an agreement for the acquisition of SGS Industrial Services, expanding industrial services in Germany
data.description: Cergy, 25th of March, 2026 - SPIE, a prominent European organization offering multi-technical services in energy and communications, has disclosed a recent agreement to acquire SGS Industrial Services Group. This acquisition marks SPIE's commitment to enhancing its industrial services in Germany and diversifying its value chain. This strategic move solidifies SPIE's position as a leading player in the industry.

data.title: Shareholders annual general meeting of April 30, 2026 - Conditions and availability of the meeting documents
data.description: The shareholders' annual general meeting is scheduled for April 30, 2026. The meeting documents will be made available to shareholders.
Get the 2025 URD, CGM details for Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield SE on May 6, 2026, and the explanatory docs.
Sanoma Corporation buys back its shares on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Ilkka Oyj: Acquisition of own shares on 25 March 2026
data.description: Ilkka Oyj announced on 25th March 2026 at 07:00 p.m. EET that they have acquired a number of their own shares from the stock exchange.

data.title: CROSSJECT appoints Lionel Seltz as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In Dijon, France on March 25, 2026 at 6:00 PM CET, CROSSJECT disclosed the appointment of Lionel Seltz as Chief Financial Officer. The company, traded on Euronext under the ticker symbol ALCJ with ISIN FR0011716265, specializes in developing emergency medicines utilizing its ZENEO® needle-free auto-injector platform. Notably, CROSSJECT's product ZEPIZURE® is designed for the emergency management of epileptic seizures.

data.title: Clean Elections Partners with the Arizona Agenda on Legislative Debates
data.description: In Phoenix on March 25, 2026, Clean Elections, the exclusive non-partisan voter education organization in Arizona authorized to conduct candidate debates, revealed a fresh collaboration with Arizona Agenda. The main goal of this alliance is to enhance visibility and availability of Arizona's legislative debates.
LNG SHIPS TRAPPED IN THE MIDDLE EAST ARE LOSING PRODUCT DUE TO EVAPORATION, ACCORDING TO MITSUI O.S.K. LINES

data.title: FDA Approves Corcept’s Selective Glucocorticoid Receptor Antagonist Lifyorli™ (relacorilant) Plus Nab-Paclitaxel for Treatment of Patients with Platinum-Resistant Ovarian Cancer
data.description: Corcept Therapeutics, a company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol CORT, based in Redwood City, California, focuses on developing medications for various disorders by regulating cortisol effects. Recently, the U.S. FDA authorized Lifyorli™ (relacorilant) combined with nab-paclitaxel for treating adults with platinum-resistant epitheli tumors. This approval marks a significant milestone for the firm in the medical field.

data.title: Thompson Hine Launches SmartPaTH Plus, a Comprehensive Legal Service Delivery Platform Powered by AI
data.description: In Cleveland, Thompson Hine LLP unveiled SmartPaTH Plus, a new legal service platform intertwining legal project management, flexible staffing, value-based pricing, process efficiency, and AI tools. This innovative model, developed over more than 12 years, merges various elements into a unified system. The platform, which has integrated AI tools into almost 100 common tasks, marks a substantial leap in the firm's commitment to process enhancement, data analysis, and technology.
ADNOC CEO SAYS IN MEETING WITH U.S. VICE PRESIDENT THAT FREE PASSAGE THROUGH STRAIT OF HORMUZ IS ONLY DURABLE SOLUTION TO STABILIZING GLOBAL MARKETS
EU Ambassador to the US: US LNG exports to the EU will increase over time, up to 57-60% in the next few years.

data.title: Autel U.S. ADAS Training Program Achieves ASE and I-CAR Accreditation
data.description: Autel U.S., a prominent automotive diagnostic tools and ADAS solutions provider based in Port Washington, New York, revealed that its Autel Academy ADAS Training Program received accreditation from the National Institute on March 25, 2026. The program aims to enhance knowledge and skills in Advanced Driver Assistance Systems.

data.title: Corsha Named 2025 TMCnet Zero Trust Security Excellence Award Winner
data.description: Corsha has been recognized as the sole awardee dedicated to safeguarding Operational Technology (OT) in Washington. On March 25, 2026, Corsha, a specialized Machine Identity Provider for operational systems, revealed its selection as the recipient of the 2025 Zero Trust Security award. This acknowledgment underscores Corsha's commitment to enhancing security measures for OT.

data.title: First Horizon Bank Welcomes Meghan Donelon as Commercial Banking Group Manager in New Orleans
data.description: On March 25, 2026, a notable bank (NYSE: FHN) in New Orleans welcomed Meghan Donelon back to its Commercial Banking team as a Group Manager. With a wealth of leadership experience and deep community ties, her return is seen as a significant asset to the bank's operations.

data.title: QUADIENT: Quadient FY 2025 results: Revenue of €1,036m, current EBIT margin at 13.0%
data.description: In the fiscal year 2025, Quadient reported a revenue of €1,036 million with a current EBIT margin of 13.0%. The company has raised its ambition for its Digital sector, aiming for it to become Quadient's largest and most profitable solution by the year 2030.
